description: Hypothetical fusion-powered triple-disc aircraft. Dense spinning cores generate self-contained magnetic fields for perfect hover and stillness. 3π² resonant cycling enables aircraft-like translation. AI brain-wave control provides instant response. No spacetime disruption; classical EM + fusion + gyro-stabilization only.

viability.conditions: unlimited tensile strength, room-temp superconductivity, perfect fusion efficiency, zero-loss BCI
viability.physics_boundary: conservation laws fully respected; reactionless hover achieved via magnetic field balancing against Earth's field and atmospheric eddy currents

dense_cores.purpose: dynamo-generated self-contained B-field (10-100 T) for eddy-current/diamagnetic hover

central_fusion_plant.purpose: powers coils, plasma thrusters, and BCI systems

math_models.cycling_frequency: f_cycle,i = f₀ ⋅ (3π²) ⋅ sin(2π t / T + 2π i / 3)   i=0,1,2

build_phases.name: Core_Materials_&_Dense_Spinning_Rotors
build_phases.steps: Fabricate 3 ultra-dense cores with perfect tensile metamaterials. Embed room-temp superconducting coils. Bootstrap spin to 10⁶ rad/s via electromagnetic drive.

build_phases.name: Triple-Disc_Airframe_&_3π²_Cycling_System
build_phases.steps: Assemble 3 discs in 120° triangle around central plant. Integrate plasma channels. Apply resonant 3π² phase cycling for field modulation and gyro stability.
build_phases.equation_used: f_cycle,i = f₀ ⋅ (3π²) ⋅ sin(2π t / T + 2π i / 3)

build_phases.name: Fusion_Power_&_Propulsion_Integration
build_phases.steps: Install central 1 GW fusion reactor. Route direct electricity to coils and modulated plasma exhaust ports. Balance magnetic repulsion for hover.

build_phases.name: AI_Assisted_Brain_Wave_Control
build_phases.steps: Embed full-implant BCI. Map pilot intent to real-time phase and thrust modulation.

build_phases.name: Assembly_Testing_&_Scaling
build_phases.steps: Orbital modular fab → ground maglev cradle tests → atmospheric flight envelope. Safety: redundant fusion shutoffs + AI failover.

disclaimer: Purely hypothetical thought-experiment under unlimited-materials assumption. No known 2026 technology can realize this today. Used solely for frontier pattern synthesis and open training.
